name: Clam Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and egg with the clams. Mix until the batter is well blended.
2. Heat a wide frying pan over high heat. Add the butter and oil (about 1/4 cup each), and allow them to foam but not brown.
3. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of clam batter into the hot fat, adding as many spoonfuls as will fit without crowding.
4. Cook, turning once, until the fritters are browned on both sides (less than a minute on each side). Remove from the pan and drain briefly on paper towels.
5. Arrange the cooked fritters on a warm serving platter. Keep warm until all fritters are cooked.
6. Add more butter and oil to the pan, if necessary, and repeat the process with the remaining clam batter.
7. When all fritters are done, season with salt, if desired, and serve immediately. Garnish with lemon wedges. Makes about 20 fritters (2-inches in diameter).
